stemHtml: In VMC, a B737 on an RNP APCH is told by ATC to follow and maintain its own separation from a preceding heavy B777, which the B737 pilot has in sight. The B737 pilot…

options.a: Must ensure the spacing from the preceding aircraft is acceptable for wake turbulence purposes.
options.b: Must not delay the approach and must maintain high speed until at least 4 NM from touchdown.
options.c: Must reduce speed to maximise spacing from the preceding aircraft for wake turbulence.
options.d: Will not receive a landing clearance and is expected to land after the preceding aircraft vacates.
